parameters.content:
## AI LinkedIn Poster

**Webhook:** `POST /webhook/linkedin-ai-post`

**Before first run:**
1. Set env vars (see Configuration node)
2. Assign OpenAI + LinkedIn OAuth credentials
3. Import `linkedin-ai-poster-errors.json` → link as Error Workflow (optional)

**Docs:** https://github.com/Ai-assistant-KIRA/n8n-ai-linkedin-poster

## Configuration

Set these **environment variables** (docker-compose / .env):

| Variable | Example | Required |
|----------|---------|----------|
| `LINKEDIN_PERSON_ID` | OpenID `sub` | ✅ |
| `LINKEDIN_API_VERSION` | `202502` | optional |

**Credentials in n8n UI:**
- OpenAI API → AI Generate Caption + Image
- LinkedIn OAuth2 → Init Upload + Create Post

Get Person ID: `GET /v2/userinfo` → `sub` field

## Image Upload

Content-Type is **auto-detected** from binary mimeType / file extension.

LinkedIn accepts **JPEG** and **PNG** only.

If you get `image/webp` or `image/gif`, add a conversion step before upload or force JPEG in **Prepare LinkedIn Payload**.

nodes.name: Webhook Trigger
nodes.notes: Entry point for AI assistants. See examples/webhook-payloads.json

nodes.name: Configuration
nodes.notes: Set LINKEDIN_PERSON_ID + LINKEDIN_API_VERSION in env. Assign credentials in downstream nodes.

nodes.name: Parse Webhook Input
nodes.notes: Normalizes webhook payload. Supports topic-only, full caption, image URL/base64, or hybrid.

messages.content: You write high-performing LinkedIn posts. Output ONLY the post text — no titles, no markdown fences. Use short paragraphs, 1-2 emojis max, 3-5 relevant hashtags at the end. Match the requested tone.

nodes.name: AI Generate Caption
nodes.notes: Swap for Anthropic, Azure OpenAI, or any LLM node.

nodes.name: AI Generate Image
nodes.notes: DALL-E 3 returns PNG. Content-Type auto-detected on upload.

nodes.name: Prepare LinkedIn Payload
nodes.notes: Auto-detects image Content-Type from mimeType/extension. See Image Format Notes sticky.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { success: true, dryRun: true, caption: $json.caption, captionSource: $json.captionSource, imageSource: $json.imageSource, imageContentType: $json.imageContentType, imageFormatWarning: $json.imageFormatWarning, mediaTitle: $json.mediaTitle, linkedinApiVersion: $json.linkedinApiVersion, message: 'Preview only — set dry_run: false to publish.' } }}

nodes.name: LinkedIn Init Upload
nodes.notes: LinkedIn-Version from LINKEDIN_API_VERSION env (default 202502). Retries 3x on failure.

nodes.name: LinkedIn Upload Image
nodes.notes: Content-Type is dynamic (image/jpeg or image/png). No OAuth on PUT — signed URL only.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ author: $('Merge Upload Data').first().json.personUrn, commentary: $('Merge Upload Data').first().json.caption, visibility: $('Merge Upload Data').first().json.visibility, distribution: { feedDistribution: 'MAIN_FEED', thirdPartyDistributionChannels: [] }, lifecycleState: 'PUBLISHED', content: { media: { title: $('Merge Upload Data').first().json.mediaTitle, id: $('Merge Upload Data').first().json.imageUrn } } }) }}
